title: STUDIO Movies Lane Sample — Warehouse Signal

config.voice_suffix: naturalistic dialogue delivery, motivated breath, cinematic intimacy, London crisp warmth, synthetic talent only

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Amara-001: identical character face, wardrobe, hair, same eye-line and blocking — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Warehouse-Industrial-001: identical industrial loft — same window grid camera-left, same concrete floor, same brick tone, same beam geometry — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Cinematic-001: cinematic grade — shallow depth of field, dramatic side key, controlled bloom on highlights, filmic S-curve, subtle anamorphic horizontal flare on practicals only, no flat YouTube lighting. Establishing wide of industrial loft at dusk, dust motes in window light, empty floor, atmospheric tension, no people visible. wide static or slow crane down Industrial window 4800K directional key locked — dust motes optional, deep shadow pockets, no magenta brick bounce, no cool fill contamination, zero hue drift. Strong key from camera left or right at 45°, fill ratio 1:4 max, rim optional single edge — lock side every segment. COLOR LOCK Warehouse: brick #8B4A3B desaturated, concrete #A8A8A8, metal #5C5C5C, window light warm-neutral 4800K — no purple shadows, no teal concrete, no neon practicals. GRADE LOCK Cinematic: teal pushed only in shadows -5% max OR amber highlights +5% — never both teal and orange at full saturation (no blockbuster split unless locked shot). Forbid magenta skin, forbid green yellow cast, forbid flat grey mids. Slow dolly or crane; rack focus motivated; no snap zoom. naturalistic dialogue delivery, motivated breath, cinematic intimacy, synthetic talent only Finish on gesture peak or rack-focus completion, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.

concept: Warehouse thriller micro-arc starring Amara Singh

camera.secondary: rack focus motivated by story beat

guardrails: synthetic talent only — no real person likeness, no celebrity mimicry
end guard mandatory on every generated segment for seamless assembly
one set_id and one style_id per scene — never blend mid-take
lip-sync speech_text must appear in video_prompt when role is speaking
duration per shot 5–15s (API clip discipline); prefer 7–9s for seamless extend chains
never hold dead stillness or dead frame at segment end
PG-13 default — no explicit violence framing, no gore linger
synthetic talent only — no real person likeness
one location per scene unless blueprint marks scene_break
character wardrobe and side-light direction locked across segments
finish every segment on motion or emotional peak — never dead hold
movies lane validation sample — not mass production
movies lane validation sample — not mass production
